title: SkillInventoryItem
description: A catalog entry for a locally-installed AI tool skill (Claude / Cursor / Codex / Trae / ...). Purpose: give the user visibility and sovereignty over what skills their machine has — NOT to inject these into atlas-read context (the coding tools already handle their own skill discovery). Introduced in V1.5 (Gap-4).

name.description: Skill name (typically from frontmatter `name` or directory name).

tags.description: Tags derived from frontmatter, file path, or aiGeneratedTags after enrichment.

localPath.description: Absolute path to the SKILL.md file on the user's machine. Used for 'open in editor' action.

toolName.description: Which AI coding tool owns this skill.

frontmatter.description: Raw YAML frontmatter parsed from SKILL.md. Structure varies by tool. Stored verbatim for user inspection.

rawDescription.description: The skill's self-declared description (from frontmatter.description or first paragraph of SKILL.md).

aiGeneratedSummary.description: Optional. Generated on-demand by T-4.3 when user clicks '✨ Understand this skill'. Concise one-paragraph explanation of what the skill does and when it triggers.

aiGeneratedTags.description: Optional. AI-suggested tags for categorization, generated alongside aiGeneratedSummary.

typicalScenarios.description: Optional. 2-5 phrases describing typical user situations where this skill should be invoked. Used for search.

triggerKeywords.description: Optional. Natural-language trigger phrases (e.g. '帮我设计一个按钮'). Used for the Skill Map filter.

userMarked.description: Optional. User's manual marker for self-organization. Null = unmarked.

fileMtime.description: Last modified time of the SKILL.md file. Used by the scanner to detect changes.

fileHash.description: Optional. sha256 of the SKILL.md content. Used when mtime is unreliable (e.g. across git clones).

stats.description: Kept for schema consistency. For skill-inventory, useCount is incremented only when the user opens/views the card in Atomsyn, NOT when the host AI tool invokes the actual skill.

imported.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · True if this item was created by atomsyn-cli bootstrap during a batch import session (rare for skill-inventory; reserved for future scanners).

bootstrap_session_id.description: V2.x bootstrap-skill · Source bootstrap session id when imported=true. Null otherwise.
